content.text: I need a safety check that validates whether a given class has a consistent Method Resolution Order (MRO) or contains duplicate base classes.
What happens if a node raises some other unexpected exception while trying to get its MRO?
If any unexpected error occurs during `node.mro()`, it will bypass the current specialized handlers and bubble up as an uncaught exception, potentially halting class processing.
Thanks for clarifying how this error handling works.
